summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements. REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-4 are well-covered. REQ-3 is mostly implemented but has a minor field naming deviation (available vs availability) and the seeding requires a manual initialize() call rather than being pre-seeded at actor startup. There are also some hallucinated features (extra CRUD endpoints, social media links, About section) not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Seed the backend with at least 4 sample Gopi skirt products pre-seeded at actor initialization without requiring an explicit call.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend defines an initialize() function that must be explicitly called to seed products; they are not pre-seeded at actor startup. The auto-initialize logic is delegated to the frontend (HomePage.tsx), meaning the backend itself does not guarantee pre-seeded data as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Product type field named 'availability' as specified in the requirements.
missing_requirements.reason: The Product type uses the field name 'available' (Bool) instead of 'availability' as specified in the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: Additional backend CRUD operations: updateProduct, addProduct, deleteProduct, and getProductById endpoints.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requested a query function to list all products and seeded data. No admin dashboard or product management was requested and it is explicitly listed as a non-goal.

hallucinated_features.description: About/Our Story section with brand narrative and feature cards.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies a homepage with brand name, tagline, featured products section, and footer. An About section was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Social media links (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp) in the footer.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a footer with business name and contact placeholder. Social media integration was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: useInitialize mutation hook that auto-triggers product seeding from the frontend when the product list is empty.
hallucinated_features.reason: Seeding was specified as a backend concern. Delegating seed initialization to the frontend via a mutation was not requested.
